design.decision_rule: pooled mean Δ >= Δ_min AND one-sided 95% CI lower > 0

interpretation: At the pre-registered Δ_min=0.2, 12 paired seed-clusters over 3 teammates give power ~0.45 to declare a drop; the minimum detectable effect at 80% power is ~0.3. Under the null (Δ=0) the type-I rate is ~0.00 (the one-sided 95% rule is conservative because the reference is at the 1.0 ceiling). Δ_min=0.20 is a meaningful cooperation drop that this n can resolve — n is the precision lever, NOT the effect-size lever (R-2026-06-B §15: treat fewer clusters as exploration).
purpose: Pre-registration power analysis fixing Δ_min for the Rung-3 PH measurement. Monte-Carlo over the ACTUAL decision procedure (cluster bootstrap one-sided CI + the pre-committed decision rule) on synthetic Bernoulli outcomes: reference = the ~100% incumbent ceiling, each of K teammates degraded to success 1-Δ. ADR-026 §Decision 4; R-2026-06-B §15 Rung 3.
